title: ClipForge render manifest v1
description: Per-project lockfile at ./renders/<slug>/render_manifest.json. Two top-level concerns: (1) clip-level input-hash diff for cf-edit partial re-render (pillar 4); (2) cumulative ai_costs across the skill chain (pillar 2). Both pillars write to the SAME file additively — cf-edit MUST preserve any existing ai_costs block byte-for-byte modulo additive breakdown keys.

clips.description: Pillar 4 — per-clip input hashes + rendered output sha256. Keys are clip_id (e.g. 'c01').

input_hashes.description: sha256: prefixed hashes of every input the renderer consumes. Missing inputs map to null. Adding fields is ADDITIVE — older readers ignore new keys.

ai_costs.description: Pillar 2 — cumulative spend across the skill chain. cf-edit MUST preserve this block byte-for-byte modulo additive breakdown keys (groq_llm, anthropic_llm, anthropic_translate added in pillar 4).
